info.name: Rakez ERP Seeded Frontend Collection
info.description:
Generated from Laravel routes via `postman/generate_seeded_collection.php` (re-run after route changes). Collection variables use seeded IDs when the script runs against a seeded database.

**2026-04-07 — Frontend-relevant API notes**

- **Deposits:** List responses expose `deposit_id`, `reservation_id`, `row_entity`. Use **`deposit_id`** in `POST .../deposits/{id}/confirm|refund` and `GET .../deposits/{id}/pdf-data`. Follow-up list rows are reservations: use **`reservation_id`** and nested **`deposits[].deposit_id`**. Sending a reservation id to deposit-scoped routes → **422** (Arabic message).
    
- **Commissions:** `PUT .../commissions/{id}/distributions` — total % **≤ 100** (remainder stays with company); **`distributions: []`** clears pending lines. Responses include `total_distributed_percentage`, `remaining_percentage`, `distributed_amount`, `remaining_amount` (also on sold-unit detail).
    
- **Marketing:** `GET .../marketing/projects/{contractId}` includes **`responsible_sales_teams`** (leaders, members, optional ratings).
    

Full detail: `docs/FRONTEND_CHANGELOG_2026-04-07.md`.
